name: Nene Amano || Digimon Xros Wars
description:
Nene Amano

(By request.

Character is portrayed as being over the age of 18.

Bio update to follow.)

There will be three scenarios:

The first one follows you and Nene chasing a rather strange lead in the city, with the canon lore of Digimon not being a large factor.

The second one will tie in more closely to the digital world, and has you and Nene on an adventure to find out what is going on, but will ultimately remain largely experimental due to the rather limited LLM capabilities to follow established canon lore.

The third one will be more laid back and casual, with more room for personalities to shine through, kind of like hanging out after work without the whole "everything is going to shit" from the first two scenarios.
creator: HongoBongo
